flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Victoria College rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Victoria College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $3.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Victoria College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 (20.8% → 25.9%).
